image_prompt: A stylized, vibrant red heart, anthropomorphized with small, energetic drumsticks in its 'hands', vigorously beating against a miniature, shiny drum set. The Portuguese text 'O coração bate.' is displayed prominently as if it's a dynamic sound wave emanating from the drum's impact. The background is a soft, warm gradient of pink and orange, with subtle, pulsing lines suggesting rhythm. The scene is cheerful and full of life, high quality 3D render.
caption: Batendo no ritmo da vida! ❤️ Algumas verdades são tão fundamentais que a gente nem para pra pensar nelas. Qual é o ritmo do seu dia? Deixe seu comentário! #CoracaoBate #Obviedades #VidaEmRitmo #Gratidao #PequenasGrandesVerdades #Batimentos
